name: Modern Djent
blurb: Tight, percussive high-gain. Screamer boost into an Uberschall, scooped-but-present mids. Rhythm and Lead snapshots.

name: Death Metal
blurb: Buzzsaw and chunk. Rectifier with a mid scoop and a fast gate, just enough room to not sound dry.

name: Metalcore Rhythm
blurb: 5150-style aggression with a Screamer tightening the low end. Mid-forward so it cuts. Rhythm and Lead.

name: Shoegaze Wash
blurb: Clean amp buried under fuzz, chorus, tape delay and a huge reverb. Chords turn into weather.

name: Worship Clean + Shimmer
blurb: Glassy clean, a dotted digital delay and a shimmer reverb. Swells and big open chords.

name: Post-Rock Swell
blurb: Clean into a cavernous reverb with a trailing delay. Build it up, let it ring out.

name: Blues Breakup
blurb: Edge-of-breakup Marshall with a spring reverb. Clean when you play soft, growls when you dig in. Lead adds a boost.

name: Classic Rock Crunch
blurb: JCM800 crunch through a Greenback-flavored cab with a touch of spring. Riffs and power chords.

name: Texas Clean
blurb: Fender-style sparkle with a hint of grit and a spring tank. Great for blues leads and clean rhythm.

name: Loathe
blurb: Downtuned shoegaze-metal — JCM800 preamp + Big Muff, four snapshots from clean to fuzz wall.

name: Deftones
blurb: Recto grit into a V30, TS boost, ambient washes. Clean / Rhythm / Lead / Heavy+Ambient.

name: Architects
blurb: 5150 preamp, tight and modern, with a Screamer out front. Four gig-ready snapshots.

name: Bring Me The Horizon
blurb: JCM800 crunch, big choruses and breakdowns across four snapshots.

name: Sleep Token
blurb: Recto ambient-to-djent dynamics, from pad-clean to heavy. Four snapshots.
